items.title: Premier League giants hit managerial reset button,...
items.summary: The Premier League season ended just nine days ago, but Arne Slot's dismissal as Liverpool manager means the biggest clubs are preparing for a new battle at the top already.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Mensik reaches first Grand Slam semifinal, set to face Zverev at Roland Garros
items.summary: Alexander Zverev and Jakub Mensik have secured their spots in the French Open semifinals, setting up a compelling clash. Zverev, a tournament favorite, showcased his dominance,...
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: New Zealand home summer to start with blockbuster all-format India tour
items.summary: The New Zealand men's side will also host Sri Lanka for an all-format tour, while the women will host Bangladesh for three T20Is and as many ODIs
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
